message:
Fix gt handoff socket confusion: use caller socket, not town socket

The root cause of gt handoff being broken: Gas Town uses a named tmux
socket (-L gt) for daemon-managed sessions, but the calling process
(Claude Code) may live on the default socket. Sessions exist on BOTH
sockets with the same names but different pane IDs.

Previously, getCurrentTmuxSession() used tmux display-message on the
town socket, which returned an arbitrary session (often hq-boot) since
the caller pane does not exist on that server. Then respawn-pane
targeted the town socket pane instead of the caller pane.

Fixes:
- getCurrentTmuxSession: resolve from GT_ROLE first (no tmux query)
- Self-handoff: use caller socket (from TMUX env) for pane operations
- Remote handoff: use town socket (townTmux) for target pane operations
- Remove stale-pane detection (was replacing valid pane with wrong one)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
